requirements.requirement: A user can be either a donor or a company.
The system must be available in both Spanish and English.
The system must allow registering new users to the system.
The system must be able to authenticate existing users via email.
The system must allow users to log out.
The system must allow logged-in or non-logged-in users to view the profiles of the various companies as well as their products.
The system must be able to save all images of all products/users of the system.
A company must be able to modify its public profile/page at any time, as well as preview it while editing.
A company must have access to the system dashboard to use the various internal functionalities and additional information (statistics, values, etc.).
A company must be able to register a product and have it visible on its public profile/page.
A company must be able to register a route to link it to its products.
A user must be able to return a product registered in a company using its routes.
Every product must have a default route in which the user returns it on their own and with their own means.
Every route must have an associated budget (which can be 0) which the user must be able to pay using the system when returning the product.
The system must have an affiliation/plan system for companies that want certain advantages (it has three plans: free, basic, and premium).
The system must be available in different languages.
The user interface must be intuitive and easy to use for non-technical users.
The system must protect user information through secure authentication.
The system must have an uptime of 99.9% and be able to recover from failures in less than 1 hour.
The system must be easy to maintain and update with clear and complete documentation.
The system must be compatible with the most common web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) and mobile devices.
The system must be scalable to handle an increase in the number of users and data volume.
Products/routes/company profile can only be editable and accessible by that company.
RT1 - External Keys(User, id) (Company, User:id), (Donor, User:id), (Product, name + User:id), (Route, id), (MarketZone, name + type), (Return, id).
RT2 - The route of a return must be of the same product that is being returned.
RT3 - The name attribute cannot be repeated among the Companies.
RT4 - The name attribute cannot be repeated among the Products of the same Company.
